free_text: The target used was a Be-foil with a mean thickness of
1.00+-0.07 mg/cm2, except for the measurement 14.0 MeV,
in which case the thickness was 0.75+-0.05 mg/cm2
CNPD: corrected 4-dig. year and lower cases
SD: Corrections in all Subents. BIB updated
The accuracy of data presentation  has been revised.
SD: SF9=EXP deleted from REACTION code.
EN-SEC deleted. STATUS updated. ANG-ERR -> ANG-ERR-D;
ERR-DIG added (info from DATA-ERR); DATA-ERR -> ERR-S.
SD: SF9=EXP deleted from REACTION code.
